page.title: Challenges
page.subtitle: Practice your CSS and XPath selectors with real-world scenarios.
page.notFoundDescription: The requested challenge could not be found.

toasts.comingSoonDescription: Stay tuned for updates on our roadmap.
toasts.notPassed: Your solution did not pass all tests. Keep trying!

playground.jsUndefined: Your result is undefined. Make sure you assign a value to `result`.
playground.jsMismatch: Your result doesn't match the expected output. Check your logic and try again.
playground.noAssertions: No assertions were called. Write assertions like: await expect(locator).toHaveText('...');
playground.selectorMismatch: Selector does not match the target element
playground.alreadyCompleted: You have already completed this challenge! Feel free to practice again.
playground.resetDescription: This will reset your code/selector to the initial state. Your current progress for this session will be lost.
playground.recommendationDescription: This {{tier}} challenge uses concepts from the {{missingName}} tier.

success.title: Challenge Complete!
success.description: Congratulations! You've successfully passed the tests for this challenge.
